+Regarding your mind trace: It seems you're trying to debug an issue related to JSON parsing error. However, without more information about what specifically is causing this error or how the code behaves in real-world conditions, it would be hard to give a precise solution.

+In case of "Cognitive block: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)", it could mean that there's an issue with parsing JSON at this location.
